intro: MEDICATIONS and remedies used in ENT care.
reading: ENT pharmacology in routine visits often centers on symptom relief, such as throat lozenges for irritation, alongside antibiotics for infections and nasal sprays for congestion.

terms.example_en: Throat lozenges can soothe a scratchy throat.
terms.example_ru: Леденцы для горла могут облегчить першение в горле.
